message:
test(fcp-raptorq): expand edge-case tests across chunk, config, envelope, error, and OTI modules

Add ~50 new tests covering:
- chunk.rs: manifest chunking edge cases, byte ordering,
  content-addressable IDs, wrong-order reconstruction, single-byte chunks
- config.rs: repair symbol calculations, source symbol counts, chunk
  counts, MTU-safe symbol sizes, preset handling, serialization
- envelope.rs: AAD size, nonce derivation, deterministic encryption
  (ChaCha20/XChaCha20), ESI differentiation, sender subkey derivation,
  tamper detection, one-byte plaintext roundtrip
- error.rs: Display/Clone/Eq trait correctness across ChunkError,
  EncodeError, and DecodeError variants
- oti.rs: const construction, CBOR roundtrip, multi-block configs,
  alignment values, invalid input rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
